## TRM1.3. Additional time in terminal airspace (PI#6) {#trm1.3.-additional-time-in-terminal-airspace-pi6 .Heading-2-TZ}

Vienna is the only Austrian airport subject to the monitoring of this indicator. The additional time in 2025 resulted in 2.80 min/arr, very close to the 2024 value -- last year of RP3 -- of 2.79 min/arr (*using the new methodology*).

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of this indicator across Member States in 2025 was 2.98 min/arr.
